chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-5739 of 2022 Date Order with signature of Judge ________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of Misc. No. 24569/2022 2. For hearing of main case 19.08.2025 Mr. Ali Safdar Asstt. A.G -.-.-.-.-.-.-. This is an old case of 2022, which is over 03 years ago. It was lastly fixed on 08.08.2023, which is 02 years ago. Despite lapse of 02 years, today none appeared for the petitioner without intimation. It appears that petitioner has lost interest in pursuing this old petition. It is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution along with all pending applications. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Wasim PS
